rules.name: High Customer Risk Score
rules.reason: Customer experience risk score exceeded safe threshold, indicating potential crisis.

rules.name: Underclaimed ROAS
rules.reason: Reported ROAS is significantly lower than actual, suggesting undercredited ad performance.

rules.name: Mixed Customer Sentiment
rules.reason: Customer sentiment on reviews is mixed despite positive social sentiment, indicating discrepancy in perception.

rules.name: Social Reach Performance
rules.reason: High conversion rate from social media reach to new customer acquisition indicates campaign efficiency.

rules.name: Healthy SKU Signal
rules.reason: All performance metrics aligned with optimal indicators for SKU health.

rules.name: High Spend with Low Rating
rules.reason: Excessive ad spend with low customer rating suggests inefficient resource allocation.

rules.name: Positive Social Sentiment
rules.reason: Social sentiment is positive, indicating good brand perception on social platforms.

rules.name: Significant ROAS Discrepancy
rules.reason: Significant discrepancy between platform reported and true ROAS raises concerns about data accuracy.

rules.name: Above Average Acquisition Efficiency
rules.reason: Exceptional conversion rate from social reach indicates high efficiency in customer acquisition.

rules.name: NPS Above Threshold
rules.reason: Net Promoter Score exceeds threshold, indicating strong customer satisfaction and loyalty.

rules.name: Support Ticket Surge
rules.reason: Increase in support tickets suggests potential issues with product or service.

rules.name: True ROAS Above Industry Standard
rules.reason: True ROAS substantially exceeds standard, demonstrating exceptional return on advertising spend.

rules.name: Out of Stock Complaints
rules.reason: Frequent out of stock complaints highlight supply chain or inventory management issues.
